---
ID: US-OLV-115
Title: Lock HR page shell spacing
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-20
Milestone: Build HR workflows and harden QA

As a designer
I want consistent HR page headers and body spacing
So that HR pages feel like one coherent product

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] HR pages use the shared split/header/body shell pattern.
- [ ] Top spacing follows the locked 36px gap standard.
- [ ] Reports, Settings, Tracks, Inventory, Assignments, and Onboarding align to the same shell.
- [ ] Future off-scale margin tokens are documented as forbidden.

Notes: Documented in locked.md and margin-scale.md.
